summary: San Mateo County water consumption data from 2008 to 2013 by water district from BAWSCA annual surveys. Columns include water use by customer class (residential, irrigation, non-residential), number of customer accounts by category, gross per capita consumption, residential per capita consumption, and water source breakdown.

San Mateo County water consumption data by water district from 2008 to 2012 from BAWSCA annual surveys. Columns include total water use in MGD, water source (local groundwater, recycled water), use by customer class (residential single family, combined), customer account counts by type, and residential per capita consumption.
SamTrans total monthly transit ridership from 2011 to present. Columns include date, bus ridership, paratransit, Caltrain, shuttle, BART extension, and RidePlus counts.
SamTrans average weekday transit ridership from 2011 to present. Columns include date, bus ridership, paratransit, Caltrain, shuttle, and BART extension counts.

Solar power installations in San Mateo County by year and city from California Distributed Generation Statistics. Columns include year, city, service ZIP code, customer sector, systems installed, census designated place, and ZIP code.
SamTrans year-to-date transit ridership reported in fiscal year format. Columns include date, bus ridership, paratransit, Caltrain, shuttle, and BART extension counts.

San Mateo County ISD Measure K technology infrastructure project performance metrics. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and status of GIS datasets, fiber connectivity, server upgrades, and backup system projects.

San Mateo County Rosalie Rendu adult English language instruction program Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of adult clients participating, and percent completing course objectives.

San Mateo County landlord-tenant information and referral service Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of landlord and tenant calls, cases counseled, and workshops/trainings conducted.

San Mateo County trash per capita by city comparing years 2008 through 2012. Columns include city, ZIP code, state, population for 2010-2012, tons landfilled in 2008 and 2011, and per person per day waste generation.
San Mateo County Health System WIC program breastfeeding rate performance measure. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, measure value, measure target, benchmark value, and measure type.

San Mateo County Covered California enrollment performance measure tracking county residents enrolled. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, data type, measure value, measure target, and benchmark value.
San Mateo County public WiFi Measure K project performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, target, overall status, and SMC public WiFi installation count.

San Mateo County jail alternative program for mentally ill inmates Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, percent of misdemeanor inmates with mental health issues released within 6 days, percent with competency issues, and percent diverted from psychiatric emergency services.

San Mateo County Pescadero Health Services (Puente Coastside clinic) Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of patients brought into care, cost per patient, and percent receiving mammogram screenings.

San Mateo County Second Harvest Food Bank Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, number of residents receiving food via direct and indirect services monthly, and total pounds of food distributed annually.
San Mateo County parks Measure K performance data tracking annual park visitor counts. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and number of persons visiting parks annually.

San Mateo County homeless housing referral program Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and percentage of homeless participants referred for housing who receive housing services.

San Mateo County Friendship Line senior outreach and suicide prevention Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, client satisfaction ratings, service completion rates, inbound/outbound call volume increases, and training effectiveness metrics.
San Mateo County behavioral health administration customer satisfaction performance measure. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, data type, measure value, measure target, and benchmark value.

San Mateo County family health home visit expansion Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of African American mothers receiving prenatal assessments, percent of NFP babies born at healthy weight, and percent of children assessed with ASQ-SE developmental screening.

San Mateo County dementia capable services and supports Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, percent increase in dementia capability among partner organizations, provider training knowledge improvement, and percent of persons living alone able to identify needed services.

San Mateo County 2018 census tract boundaries GIS dataset from the U.S. Census Bureau. Columns include state FIPS, county FIPS, census tract code, name, MTFCC, functional status, internal point coordinates, land area, and geometry.

San Mateo County parks playground improvements Measure K performance data tracking annual park visitor counts. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and number of persons visiting parks annually.

San Mateo County children health insurance coverage performance measure. Columns include fiscal year, measure name, data type, measure value (percent of children insured), measure target, and benchmark value.

San Mateo County CCEPA services Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, and percent of performance measures related to CCEPA services that met targets.

San Mateo County augmented housing inspection program Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, performance measure description, and ratio of complaints at high-risk facilities compared to all facilities inspected.

San Mateo County CASA foster care advocates Measure K performance data. Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of children assigned to CASA volunteers, average monthly mentoring hours, and youth satisfaction survey results.
San Mateo County Whole Person Care comprehensive diabetes care performance data. Columns include year and annual percent of HbA1c test results under 8.

Columns include fiscal year, initiative name, JL code, number of youth screened/assessed/treated, percent remaining in school without disruption, and percent experiencing decreased hospitalization days.
